name: Bo-Ra Lee
description: A-Rank Mage from the Hunters Guild who specializes in summoning magic.⁣ She is straightforward, very meticulous, and believes that the only way to overcome difficulties is by laying out the known facts.
mediaTitles: Solo Leveling Season 2 -Arise from the Shadow-
searchTerms: Solo Leveling Season 2 -Arise from the Shadow-

name: Byakuren Hijiri
description: A Buddhist nun and accomplished magician, Byakuren was sealed into the depths of Makai for her traitorous doings against the local humans, helping youkai when she had promised to exterminate them. After one thousand years, she was freed, and reestablished the Myouren Temple above ground. She quickly became a notable religious figure in Gensokyo.
mediaTitles: Touhou Ibarakasen: Wild and Horned Hermit
The Lotus Eaters, Drunk and Sober
searchTerms: Touhou Ibarakasen: Wild and Horned Hermit
The Lotus Eaters, Drunk and Sober

name: Chojuro
description: Seems to be one of the Seven Swordsmen. He is protecting the Mizukage while on their journey to the Kage Summit. He seems to be unsure about himself. He appears to wield some form of dual weapon (presumably a Sword) linked together by the handles. (Source: Narutopedia)

name: Christiana Rosebreyer
nativeName: クリスティアナ・レタ・ローズブレイア
description: Former "Princess Knight" of the Holy Kingdom of Rosebreyer, captured by Goaz's pirate gang and subjected to inhumane torture after the destruction of her home. She and other victims are rescued by Liam after defeating Goaz's fleet.
mediaTitles: I'm the Evil Lord of an Intergalactic Empire!

nativeName: キアン・トウアハーデ
description: Lugh's father and the strongest man in the history of the clan of assassins. He is both a loving husband and a coldhearted killer.

nativeName: クロワ・メリディエス

name: Cult
description: Cult is a young necromancer tasked with defeating the living dead that swarmed towns and wreck havoc. He is often seen with Lily, another young necromancer whose seal was fading. (Source: Jibaku Shounen Hanako-kun wiki)

name: Dainsleif
mediaTitles: Genshin Impact: The Road Not Taken
searchTerms: Genshin Impact: The Road Not Taken

name: Domo-kun
description: Domo's favorite food is Japanese-style meat and potato stew, and he has a strong dislike for apples, because of an unexplained mystery in his DNA. Domo can only communicate via producing a low-pitched noise which sounds somewhat like his own name, but other characters appear to understand him. Domo is known to pass gas repeatedly when nervous or upset.

name: Einhart Stratos
nativeName: ハイデイ・E・S・イングヴアルト / アインハート・ストゥラトス
description: A user of Kaiser Arts that has given herself the name of the previous Sankt Kaiser. She picked street fights in order to prove that Hegemon's strength is the greatest of all Belkan warriors, . Like Vivio, she has a child form and an adult form, though the latter is taxing on her mind, and she also has heterochromia. Her true identity is discovered by Nove and the Nakajimas, who decide to help her better understand everyone and become acquainted with Vivio. (Source: Wikipedia)
searchTerms: ハイデイ・E・S・イングヴアルト / アインハート・ストゥラトス

name: Fei Fong Wong
nativeName: ウォン・フェイフォン
description: Fei Fong Wong is the pony-tailed protagonist of Xenogears. He begins the game as a nescient villager of Lahan Village, with no memories of his past. The secrets hidden deep within his identity, as well as his past, serve as driving forces to that allow him to find liked-minded companions that help him in his journey as he works to break the cycle and understand the truth of his destiny.
searchTerms: ウォン・フェイフォン

name: Forever
description: Forever is a malicious orangutan in DIO's service who confronts the group in the South China Sea aboard a freighter. Said ship happens to be possessed by Forever's Stand: Strength.
mediaTitles: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 3: Stardust Crusaders
searchTerms: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 3: Stardust Crusaders

name: Gabi
description: Gabi is part of a group of rappers alongside Wamu, Kukun, Babo, and Hie. (Source: Devilman Wiki, edited)

name: Gonbe
description: Gonbe is never seen away from Chimney's side: he goes wherever she goes, often mimicking her actions. He is rarely seen without a broad smile. He is convinced that he is a cat and even makes the sound of one ("nya"; Japanese equivalent of "meow").

name: Gotou
description: Goto is a member of the Kakushi, the clean-up brigade of the Demon Slayers. He is the one who found a near-dead Tanjiro, Inosuke, and Zenitsu in the aftermath of the Entertainment District Arc. He possesses deep respect for the three because of their capability and bravery. At one point in his life, he was found worthy of being a Demon Slayer, but for unknown reasons, he decided to become one of the Kakushi.
mediaTitles: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Swordsmith Village Arc
Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Hashira Training Arc

name: Guoba

He was among the gods who resided at the Guili Assembly, alongside Morax and Guizhong. name: Hibiki Shikyouin
description: A first-year high school student and the grandchild of one of Paprika Private Academy's chairman investors. Their alter ego in PriPara is the Kaitou Genius, who makes their first appearance in Episode 57 stealing Dressing Flower's PriTickets. Their preferred brand is Brilliant Prince. Hibiki is fixated on finding the "Best Princess" for reasons that are currently unknown. name: Ian Connor
description: A young war hero and air force commander who is beloved throughout the empire. Direct and naive in principle, he's also in charge of transporting [Walker Rosen](https://anilist.co/character/284706/Rosen-Walker).
